_comment: Species: Blood Ancestor Beast (血祖兽) from Renegade Immortal. Canonical definition with all 13 fields per the Er Gen simulation spec. Prime Directive: Reality is objective; cultivation changes understanding, not existence. Every state described here exists independently of the player's perception.
name: Blood Ancestor Beast

canonical.appearance: Formless mass of congealed blood 50 m across, can shape into any beast form, perpetually dripping
canonical.size: 50 m mass, 100000 jin; ancient forms span kilometers
canonical.behavior: Seeks bloodlines to consume; cultivates by absorbing entire bloodlines; killed by Wang Lin after long conflict
canonical.habitat: Blood-aspected forbidden zones, ancient battlefields, Blood Sea
canonical.diet: bloodlines, blood-aspected herbs, entire beast species
canonical.relationships: Enemy of Wang Lin; ancestor of all blood-mutation beasts
canonical.ecology: Inferred AFTER canonical fields; see ecosystem definitions.

inner_dan_properties.canon_note: blood_ancestor_beast — no specific inner dan documented in canon

art_direction.generator: single canonical definition drives 10 life-state variants
art_direction.note: Per art-direction directive: build generators, not assets.
